title: ValuationTimeDayEnum
description: The day at which the value of the collateral and obligations to transfer or return collateral are to be calculated relative to the Valuation Date.
enum: Previous Local Business Day (City of Valuation Agent)

oneOf.title: AsSelected
oneOf.description: Should be calculated relative to the previous local business day as selected.

oneOf.title: PreviousLocalBusinessDay
oneOf.description: Should be calculated relative to the previous local business day.

enum: Previous Local Business Day (City of Valuation Agent)
oneOf.title: PreviousLocalBusinessDayCityOfAgent
oneOf.description: Should be calculated relative to the previous local business day in the city of the Valuation Agent.

oneOf.title: PreviousLocalBusinessDayMarket
oneOf.description: Should be calculated relative to the previous local business day in the Relevant Market).

oneOf.title: ValuationDate
oneOf.description: Should be calculated on the Valuation Date.
